title.rendered: Echo Park Swan Boats Featured in LA Times Council Article

content.rendered:
SWAN-Y DAY

” Visitors enjoy the sunshine and a ride on a swan boat in Echo Park. Warm weather conditions continue this week.”

Fresh off the pages of the LA Times, Echo Park Lake is soaking up classic SoCal sunshine—and there’s no better way to enjoy it than from the water! Wheel Fun Rentals’ iconic swan boat rentals let visitors pedal across the lake at an easy pace, taking in skyline views, palm trees, and pure LA vibes. It’s the perfect activity for a warm, sunny day with friends, family, or a low-key date. Swan boat reservations are required, so plan ahead and get ready for a sunny, swan-filled escape in the heart of Los Angeles.

Click here to book now!
